tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_annotation_queue_visible_in_list_endpoint
tests.trace:
def test_annotation_queue_visible_in_list_endpoint():
        expected_name = _expected_queue_name()
        base_url = _langfuse_base_url()
        auth = _langfuse_auth()
    
        found = False
        page = 1
        for _ in range(20):
            response = httpx.get(
                f"{base_url}/api/public/annotation-queues",
                params={"page": page, "limit": 100},
                auth=auth,
                timeout=30.0,
            )
            assert response.status_code == 200, (
                f"Listing annotation queues failed on page {page}: "
                f"HTTP {response.status_code}: {response.text}"
            )
            data = response.json().get("data") or []
            if not data:
                break
            if any(item.get("name") == expected_name for item in data):
                found = True
                break
            page += 1
    
>       assert found, (
            f"Annotation queue named {expected_name!r} was not found in any page of "
            f"GET /api/public/annotation-queues."
        )
E       AssertionError: Annotation queue named 'qa-review-queue-zr-va92mcf' was not found in any page of GET /api/public/annotation-queues.
E       assert False

tests/test_final_state.py:239: AssertionError
tests.message: The test failed in the call phase due to an assertion error
